hero.title: Juan Manuel Torres
hero.subtitle: Geospatial Systems Developer for Mineral Exploration
hero.description: I connect geology with software engineering to transform exploration data into structured, queryable, and visual systems. I develop Python APIs, spatial databases (PostgreSQL/PostGIS), and interactive web applications focused on geospatial analysis.

featured.title: GEO-PLATFORM v3.0
featured.description: An end-to-end platform designed to manage, analyze, and visualize mineral exploration data in real workflows.
featureList: Structures drillhole data in a normalized spatial database
Exposes analytical data through a FastAPI backend
Serves GeoJSON for real-time map integration
Enables interactive exploration via a React + Leaflet interface

geeApps.title: Google Earth Engine Applications
geeApps.app1: Highest-Points-of-Argentina-Glaciar-Hydro-DEM: 3D visualization of Andean peaks with glacier, hydrology, and geological structure layers.
geeApps.app2: Cordobaengine: DEM-based topographic and hydrography analysis for regional studies.
geeApps.tech: Tech: Google Earth Engine, Landsat/Sentinel imagery, PostGIS
